name: Tex-Mex Bake
recipeInstructions:
Green chilies should be drained.
Cheese should be any mild cheese and should be shredded. Should equal 1 cup.
~--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Combine corn chips, egg, and water; press into a 9-inch pie plate or casserole dish. Bake for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, in a large bowl, combine onion soup mix, ground beef, chilies, half of the cheese, and tomato sauce; evenly press into prepared crust. Top with tomato sauce, then green pepper. Bake for an additional 30 minutes. Top with remaining cheese, then bake for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese is melted and beef is done.
